slots.question: Chicago trip starts in 11 days, but you need to book a warm backpacking destination for March 14-15 first. No location = no gear planning.
answer: Zion 60-70°F mid-March, best warm option near Chicago
Big Bend Texas also warm, more remote
Need flights by this week to avoid price spike
slots.next_step: Search warm March backpacking spots near Chicago

slots.question: Japan in 21 days. Kyoto hotel starts March 25, but you haven't planned any activities yet. Catherine visits in 5 days—won't have focus then.
answer: Fushimi Inari best early morning to avoid crowds
Arashiyama Bamboo Grove + monkey park half-day
Philosopher's Path connects Silver Pavilion to Nanzenji
slots.next_step: Save Fushimi Inari + Arashiyama to Kyoto doc

slots.question: You're buying 4 pairs of eyeglasses in Japan (21 days) but haven't checked if insurance covers overseas purchases or what prescription format Japan needs.
answer: Japan may need PD measurement on prescription
US insurance often reimburses overseas with receipts
Jins and Zoff in Kyoto do same-day glasses
slots.next_step: Email insurance about Japan eyeglasses coverage
